_comment: RBA-7 capstone shared logical fixture. Both the C++ gtest and the Rust cargo test build an in-memory Arrow batch from THIS file (native Arrow builders, not IPC) so null placement is reviewable and cross-language IPC reader differences are out of the picture. Maps are ordered {key,value} arrays so key order/duplicates stay explicit and Arrow-compatible. field_metadata is keyed by POSITIONAL field index (canonical, RBA spec section 5): index 0 is populated, indices 1.. are intentionally absent ({}) except index 3 which carries a second populated map. The absent entries prove C++ nullptr == Rust empty-map normalization.
